prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is P-103 Hangers & supports within 2.2 Mechanical - Piping & Plumbing. The relevant subcategory is 2.2.1 Process Piping (T1/T2). The observed field condition is: missing guides near expansion loops. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors project support standards, MSS SP-58.
title: T2 P-103 Fault diagnosis
